content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use the Simple Assignment (`=`), Addition Assignment (`+=`), and Subtraction Assignment (`-=`) operators in C to assign and update values of an integer variable efficiently.
We will declare an integer variable, apply each assignment operator step-by-step, and print the result after each operation.

 **When executed, the code will show:**

```default
After simple assignment: 20
After addition assignment (+= 10): 30
After subtraction assignment (-= 4): 26
```
